articles.title: Former Lynn educator, one of Amazon’s ‘teachers of the year,’ charged with child rape
articles.description:
Prosecutors allege Tymond Tran sexually abused a then-14-year-old student while teaching the eighth grade in 2022 to 2023.

The post Former Lynn educator, one of Amazon’s ‘teachers of the year,’ charged with child rape appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: After medical emergency, Boston Councilor Mejia says she does not have ‘heart condition’
articles.description:
Councilor Julia Mejia was told to wear a heart monitor as a precaution but continued to attribute her medical episode to dehydration and exhaustion.
